    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Class VertexPreprocessor<TvG, TvM, TvS>

    Represents a VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS> preprocessor used by VertexPreprocessor

    Inheritance
    object
    VertexPreprocessor<TvG, TvM, TvS>
    Inherited Members
    object.ToString()
    object.Equals(object)
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.GetHashCode()
    object.GetType()
    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Geometry.VertexTypes
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public sealed class VertexPreprocessor<TvG, TvM, TvS> where TvG : struct, IVertexGeometry where TvM : struct, IVertexMaterial where TvS : struct, IVertexSkinning
    Type Parameters
    Name Description
    TvG

    The vertex fragment type with Position, Normal and Tangent. Valid types are: VertexPosition, VertexPositionNormal, VertexPositionNormalTangent.
    TvM

    The vertex fragment type with Colors and Texture Coordinates. Valid types are: VertexEmpty, VertexColor1, VertexTexture1, VertexColor1Texture1.
    TvS

    The vertex fragment type with Skin Joint Weights. Valid types are: VertexEmpty, VertexJoints4, VertexJoints8.

    Constructors

    Name Description
    VertexPreprocessor()

    Methods

    Name Description
    Append(VertexGeometryPreprocessor<TvG>)
    Append(VertexMaterialPreprocessor<TvM>)
    Append(VertexSkinningPreprocessor<TvS>)
    Clear()
    PreprocessVertex(ref VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>)
    SetSanitizerPreprocessors()
    SetValidationPreprocessors()
